message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-mcp-error): pin McpErrorCode + McpJsonRpc{Request,Response,Error} agent-facing wire contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-ly1ci)

30 tests pinning the agent-facing MCP wire surface beyond
McpProtocolVersion (already covered). Drift in any of these breaks
every external MCP client.

- McpErrorCode 10 numeric values pinned individually:
  JSON-RPC standard -32600/-32601/-32602/-32603 (InvalidRequest,
  MethodNotFound, InvalidParams, InternalError) + MCP extensions
  -32001..-32006 (ToolNotFound, ToolExecutionError, ResourceNotFound,
  AuthenticationRequired, PermissionDenied, RateLimited)
- code ↔ from_code inverse round-trip for all 10 variants
- from_code returns None for unknown codes (-32700 ParseError gap,
  0, -1, -32604, i32::MAX/MIN)
- default_message documented English strings for all 10 variants
- is_standard_jsonrpc / is_mcp_specific XOR partition (every variant
  in exactly one bucket)
- Display format "{message} ({code})" exact wire contract
- Hash + Copy + Eq for HashMap-keyed error-rate trackers
- McpJsonRpcRequest::new sets jsonrpc="2.0", preserves id+method,
  params=None default; serde omits params=None, includes params=Some;
  id can be String or Number per JSON-RPC 2.0
- McpJsonRpcResponse::success sets jsonrpc="2.0", preserves id+result
- McpJsonRpcError serde omits data=None, includes data=Some
- McpJsonRpcErrorResponse field carriage + full serde roundtrip
  identity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
